laws.law: Literal-shaped type-position spellings [T], #mut[T], #set{T}, #map{K:V}, and ${label:T,...} are accepted only as PREVIEW_DESIGN sugar for existing canonical identities and remain nonactivatable. Parser goals, one-based indexing, the current bracket matrix, Union formation, Map/Record domains, and current Prelude signatures are unchanged. Collection ownership is immutable-first with explicit mutable owners; Sequence stays traversal-only. Current FrozenList and ListSnapshot identities remain distinct. Freeze is shallow, failure-atomic, and supplies no shareability proof; snapshot preserves its source and yields an independent point-in-time value; a view is owner-bounded and coordinate/provenance preserving. Semantic P0 is 0, feature P1 remains exactly 22 OPEN, and product lanes remain 15/15 NOT_RUN.
laws.source_evidence: Supp Deeplus Literal-Shaped Type Surface and Collection Naming Proposal R1; spec/contracts/literal-shaped-collection-design.json

laws.law: Enum declaration-order Ord derivation, case-owned Display mapping, and payload-free exact-variant subset aliases are accepted only as PREVIEW_DESIGN and remain nonactivatable. The order profile uses exactly one of enum#increasing or enum#decreasing, forms one whole-Enum Ord witness, and keeps SemanticOrderRank separate from VariantId, raw, serialization, layout, ABI, match priority, and operator glyph routing. A case-owned ~> mapping is all-or-none, uses a restricted read-only String template, and forms one whole-Enum Display witness. An enum-associated subset uses explicit type syntax, finite same-owner VariantId membership, owner representation and witnesses, lossless owner widening, and checked narrowing. Current Enum syntax and markers remain unchanged; semantic P0 is 0, feature P1 remains exactly 22 OPEN, and product lanes remain 15/15 NOT_RUN.
laws.source_evidence: Supp1 Enum Declaration-Order Derived Ord Review R1; Supp1 Enum Display Mapping and Variant-Subset Union Review R1; spec/contracts/enum-derived-capabilities.json

laws.law: Named-rest declarations use `name***: Record`; function types use `Record***`; call and materialization named unfold use `**expr`.
Lazy bindings use `let#lazy`; `let@lazy` is recovery-only.
Sealed classes use `sealed class`; `class#sealed` is removed.
Unit multiplication uses `*`; the middle dot is recovery-only.
The obsolete prefixed collection spelling is entirely absent; ordinary List and NumericArray forms remain.
The package is self-contained; the exact Grammar and Frontend Model are separate canonical artifacts.
The frontend, HIR, MIR and xVM are implemented in Rust; Deeplus MIR is semantic authority; xVM interprets bytecode; LLVM provides AOT and later ORC JIT.
Rightward local binding is ordinary `let` or `var` sugar and leaves no semantic residue.
Raw String is Stable design; R2 and provider derive-via are official tooling contracts.
Source AST quotation and logic-variable surfaces are absent; internal compiler trees remain implementation data.
The accepted bounded sugar families elaborate to existing core forms and retain their active diagnostics.
The dynamic/unsafe quarantine profile is nonactivatable Preview design.
Map dot-key projection, increment/decrement expressions, the tailrec callable kind, regex literals and automatic heterogeneous-List Union inference are absent.
The lexical vocabulary contains 30 hard keywords and 101 contextual words after removal of obsolete source roles.
TC-R001..R016 are accepted only as PREVIEW_DESIGN nonactivatable successor law; current Trait Conformance and lowercase via remain unchanged.
TCC-DG-001..008 and TCC-DG-P2-009/A/B are PREVIEW_DESIGN nonactivatable guards with no VIA/AUTO, specialization, or child-local witness activation.
Class/Enumeration CE-G6 successor law is PREVIEW_DESIGN nonactivatable; current mixed payload and four current Enum markers remain unchanged.

Static-first Dyn/Facet successor law is PREVIEW_DESIGN and nonactivatable; current borrow Facet remains unchanged and product support is not claimed. The exact OPEN P1 set has total 22: Class 6, Enumeration 8, Trait 7, and SFD-P1-009 1; SFD-P1-001..008 are CLOSED_BY_DESIGN_NORMATIVE_STATIC_RATIFICATION_R1. The historical string f509fce5df6c16b77d3acccdcde4c640b093da0a is immutable non-authoritative provenance; the corrected actual historical main is f509fce5df6c16b77d3accdccde4c640b093da0a. The successor relation is CONTROLLING_STATUS_AND_ERRATUM_APPLIED; Git commit SHA and artifact SHA-256 remain separate identity domains.
U-07 is excluded from this adoption tranche pending explicit user selection; no E-02/E-06 migration alternative or automatic rewrite is selected.
All adopted successor rows use PREVIEW_DESIGN, source_activation nonactivatable, implementation NOT_AUTHORIZED, support NOT_CLAIMED, and product lanes 15/15 NOT_RUN.

One Pattern CST/AST is admitted through explicit context policies. Ordinary parameters are identifiers; plain bindings are statically irrefutable; refutable owners use nonconsuming test/probe, zero-or-one pure guard, and one atomic ownership commit. Current carriers are nominal variants, Record label subsets, and exact-or-final-ignored-tail List; tuple patterns and open/captured rests are absent.
laws.source_evidence: Supp1 Destructuring/Pattern Matching review packs R1/R2 and user canonicalization direction

laws.law: array and case are ordinary identifiers. Positional unfold consumes Sequence or statically known tuple evidence, never NumericArray flattening. Result applications preserve the error role, conditions are Bool, and try/@try require a catch or finally owner.
laws.source_evidence: Design Handoff Array/Case Identifier Type Clarification R1 and user canonicalization direction

laws.law: Functions, methods, local functions, closures, and lambdas preserve value/context/witness/rest channels together with ownership, capture, cleanup, effects, errors, cancellation, suspension, isolation, call-right, and lifetime. Phase-A generic inference is argument-driven, requires one unique normalized substitution, and uses an expected result only to verify an already solved substitution. Call admission resolves one declaration identity without return-type-directed overload selection and then checks positional, labeled, repeated, named-unfold, context, and using-evidence channels independently. An ordinary mut parameter is a callee-owned mutable local and is distinct from caller-place inout. Closure borrow/inout/move/copy/clone/deep/once captures have explicit acquisition, escape, witness, cleanup, and callable-multiplicity boundaries. Public parameter decomposition is explicit in the body; return and local ret keep distinct owners.
laws.source_evidence: cross-domain language coherence review and user canonicalization direction

laws.law: Actors own isolated state and a mailbox with one mutating turn at a time. An omitted MailboxClause selects logical_unbounded_v1; #mailbox(capacity: N) selects bounded_reject_v1 and immediately returns ActorMessageError::mailboxFull when full. One-way message expressions have exact type Result<Unit, error ActorMessageError>; requests have exact immediate type Result<Task<T>, error ActorMessageError> and the Task is extracted before await. Only a successfully admitted actor-request Task<T> carries the non-forgeable typed-HIR/module-API/MIR TaskResponsibility descriptor, so its normalized result type, handler ErrorSet, cancellation axis, isolation owner, request correlation identity, and receiverClosedBeforeReply terminal failure remain preserved without introducing a second visible Task type parameter; an ordinary async Task<T> carries no actor transport descriptor. Rejection before enqueue commit retains moved owners and allocates no channel_sequence; commit transfers each owner exactly once and allocates a strictly increasing sequence in the exact sender/receiver/mailbox-profile FIFO key. Cancellation remains distinct before and after commit, request/reply remains correlated and single-terminal, tasks remain structurally scoped, and product execution remains NOT_RUN.
laws.source_evidence: Issue #28 cross-role audit, spec/contracts/actor-concurrency-coherence.json, and user canonicalization direction

laws.law: Deeplus values keep semantic identity separate from storage, serialization, discriminant, ABI, and backend layout. Int is the checked signed 64-bit default; null is recovery-only and absence uses ::none in an expected Option context or Option<T>::none explicitly. The current operator vocabulary, fixity, binding power, and associativity are closed. Arbitrary custom operators are rejected and recovery-only. Fixed existing-glyph conformance dispatch is Stable only for exact binary +, -, and * under intrinsic reservation plus one left-owner DIRECT_GLOBAL conformance with no conversion, order ranking, fallback, or runtime relookup. Stable ternary evaluates one Bool condition and exactly one lazy arm and joins type, ownership, effect, error, cancellation, place, and cleanup responsibility without synthesizing a Union. Map literals evaluate direct entries and Map unfolds once from left to right, replace duplicate keys deterministically inside one failure-atomic plan, and publish no partial Map. Basic String interpolation preselects deterministic synchronous Display witnesses, evaluates holes once in source order, and grants no hidden locale, provider, serialization, parsing, or redaction authority; colon format-spec semantics remain DEFERRED_PRODUCT_HANDOFF. Attached NumericArray transpose is a semantic nonowning, owner-bounded read-only coordinate view with no implicit element copy, language-observable allocation authority, mutation, adjoint, or isolation crossing; backend representation remains unselected. Built-in ordered sequences and default NumericArray axes are one-based, bounded lists preserve declared coordinates, slices preserve coordinates and owner provenance, and [] is activated only by the closed built-in carrier matrix.

Flow facts live in Phi and never mutate declared types. Exact typed alternatives are refutable inside closed Union pattern owners; the existing closed-Union-only `is`/`!is` forms parse an exact TypeRef alternative, evaluate the subject and stored injection identity once, and produce complementary Bool edge facts without binding. `is` intersects/removes the target on true/false edges and `!is` swaps them; `and then` receives the left true fact, `otherwise` the left false fact, and strict `and`/`or` do not pre-narrow. Durable facts require a stable place and die on assignment, aliasing mutation, exclusive borrow, escape/capture, consume, or a may-mutate/may-consume call. Neither form introduces open RTTI. def#guard call results are opaque to narrowing. Union formation requires a finite pairwise DISJOINT proof, guarded match arms never establish exhaustiveness, and pattern probes commit ownership only after structural success and a true admitted guard. Product execution remains NOT_RUN.

Exactly ClassDecl, TraitDecl, EnumDecl, TypeAliasDecl, SchemaDecl, ActorDecl, ActorProtocolDecl, TypestateResourceDecl, and BitfieldDecl are type-producing top-level visibility owners. In every stable or preview library, executable, and script root they require an explicit public/common/private domain; omission is recovery-only and produces zero admitted HIR type identities. Every other top-level owner carrying TopLevelVisibility? defaults an omitted word to private. Wider API residue cannot expose a narrower identity, common is never external or re-exported, and public requires a separately admitted export or module interface.

A MessageSuffix preserves a plain or statically qualified selector and carries exactly zero or one normalized payload aggregate, never an ordinary ArgumentList. Positional parenthesized content is one Tuple payload, all-named content is one structural Record payload, empty parentheses are a no-payload compatibility spelling, and mixed positional/named payload is rejected. Ordinary and message calls share one ordered TrailingClosureGroup: one closure may be unlabeled or labeled, while two or more must all have unique labels and bind exact function-typed formals. Qualified selector resolution is static and terminal in its selected nominal, Trait, extension, actor, or actor-protocol domain; actor dispatch has no ordinary-method fallback. HIR/MIR preserve selected identity, payload projection, closure labels, source evaluation order, ownership, effects, errors, isolation, and cleanup. Semantic P0 remains 0, the existing feature P1 set remains exactly 22 OPEN, and product lanes remain 15/15 NOT_RUN.

array and case are ordinary IDENTIFIER spellings and occur in no keyword or sigil-role vocabulary. Stable raw String uses exactly the attached #raw"..." surface; prefixless raw"..." and alternate delimiter families are rejected while exact body scalars remain uninterpreted. QualifiedPath contains one or more identifier segments joined by ::. Learner-facing material teaches this positive path model without repeatedly foregrounding invalid punctuation, while exact diagnostics and negative fixtures remain available when an error occurs. Package is the distribution, dependency, build, artifact, and provenance unit; Module is the namespace, visibility, name-resolution, and source-composition unit. ModuleId combines PackageId and ModulePath, and filesystem layout is not language identity. Semantic P0 remains 0, the existing feature P1 set remains exactly 22 OPEN, and product lanes remain 15/15 NOT_RUN.
laws.source_evidence: User vocabulary, raw String, qualified-path, and package/module coherence direction

laws.law: Arbitrary glyph/fixity/precedence custom operators are not a Deeplus feature and are retained only as recovery/no-go evidence. Existing fixed-glyph conformance overloading is STABLE_DESIGN for exact binary +, -, and *: it freezes a direct-global, left-owner, intrinsic-reserved, pure borrowed, no-fallback/no-relookup profile without closing TCC-P1-002..008. The Stable &&/||/^^/~~ family is described as pointwise logical: current packed-bit behavior is preserved and exact same-shape NumericArray values over one known-width integer element domain gain the pure total built-in lift, while scalar Bool, NumericArray<Bool>, broadcast, dynamic/heterogeneous/generic collections and user carriers remain excluded or deferred. Stable scope#static is an exact function-body prologue owned by an admitted synchronous named CallableImplementationId; it runs once per normalized specialization at first actual invocation after input staging and before ownership commit, observes no caller input/authority, calls no activation-bearing or dynamic target, publishes exactly Ready or one cached Failed identity with release/acquire, never retries or deadlocks on reentry, and carries exact HIR/MIR/API identity while every product lane remains NOT_RUN. The older Trait shared-design report contributes only identity/coherence/no-order/no-runtime-relookup principles already represented by TC-R001..R016 and TCC-DG; its alternate type/derives/auto/conform/local-witness/specialization surfaces do not replace current conformance/requires/lowercase-via authority. Semantic P0 remains 0 and the existing feature P1 set remains exactly 22 OPEN.
laws.source_evidence: Eight attached Trait/operator/function-static design reports, explicit user rejection of arbitrary custom operators, and current authority reconciliation

laws.law: Rational is an always-available exact stdlib-backed value over a normalized BigInt pair and <p/q> is its expression-prefix transactional literal. Complex admits exactly Float32/Float64 Rep in the initial profile, bare Complex normalizes to Complex<Float64>, and an attached floating i token makes 3.0 + 4.0i canonical without creating a global i binding or public ABI. Stable fixed-glyph conformance remains exactly binary +,-,*; scalar real/Complex ^ is a closed static language intrinsic with mathematical unary precedence, right associativity, a real-preserving route and signed-zero-aware principal Complex route. Static capability lookup separates Type::item, Type::extension::item, <T as Trait>::item and explicit runtime owners without a companion object or runtime Trait search. The verified fully typed/resolved/responsibility-closed HIR-H1 boundary is adopted as the current design bridge, while its RFC, MIR-X1 implementation, backend switch and every product lane remain nonactivatable or NOT_RUN. Semantic P0 remains 0 and the exact existing feature P1 set remains 22 OPEN.
laws.source_evidence: Five attached companion, Complex/Rational and exponentiation authority proposals; explicit user i-literal/HIR-H1/canonicalization direction; bounded multi-role reconciliation

authority_policy: USER_DIRECT records current user direction and receives strong presumptive weight, but remains reviewable against contradictions and evidence; no decision row is immutable constitutional law. Explicit decisions adopted for this release control its projections until revised. DESIGNER_ACCEPTED decisions are reviewable; DERIVED_PROJECTION rows have no independent authority.
